title: BG Electrical Cooker Switch with Socket and LED, Cooker Control Unit, Control Socket, Double Pole, Raised Profile, Round Edges, Nexus Metal, Brushed Steel, Grey Inserts, 45A, NBS70G
features: SLEEK AND SLIM BRUSHED STEEL COOKER CONTROL UNIT WITH LED POWER INDICATORS: From BG Electrical, this 45A cooker unit switch and 13A socket has a sleek round edge, red rocker switch and colour matching screws. Ideal for domestic or commercial use

PART OF THE NEXUS METAL RANGE: From BG Electrical, has softly rounded corners, and a slim profile – combining quality with modern elegance. Featuring integrated moisture gasket preventing the edges from tarnishing.

CONVENIENT COOKER CONTROL DOUBLE POLE SWITCHING: Safely operates a hardwired cooker, oven or hob independently from other appliances for easy isolation. Features double pole for high integrity circuits and twin-earth as standard for additional safety
COLOUR CODED CAPTIVE SCREW TERMINALS: Makes it incredibly easy to install and to connect the wires. Fits a 47mm back box, ideal for retrofit.
BG ELECTRICAL 25 YEARS MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: They guarantee against faulty materials and workmanship for 25 years – giving you total peace of mind
Sleek and slim metal accessories with softly rounded edges
13 A socket for additional appliance outlet
Easy to install, supplied with fixing screws and installation instructions
